## Fast CI Results

### Summary of Failures:
1. **Prettier Formatting** - 2 files need formatting: - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
2. **Exec Reference Check** - OUT OF DATE: - `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` needs regeneration - Run: `erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs`
3. **Type Check (ty)** - 1 diagnostic found: - **File:** `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/classify_pr_feedback.py:474` - **Error:** Invalid argument type for `_classify_impl()` - **Issue:** Argument `comments` is `IssueComments` but function expects `list[IssueComment]` - **Location:** Line 474 in `classify_pr_feedback.py`
### Passing Checks:
- Linting (ruff): All checks passed - Format check: 1738 files already formatted - Markdown check: Passed - Unit Tests (erk): 5924 passed - Unit Tests (erk-dev): 138 passed - Unit Tests (erk-statusline): 123 passed - Unit Tests (erk-mcp): 50 passed (indicated by completion)

1. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/classify_pr_feedback.py` - Type mismatch on line 474 2. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - Needs Prettier formatting 3. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md` - Needs Prettier formatting 4. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` - Out of date, needs regeneration
